steps.title: Identify the main verb position
steps.content: The blank must contain the main verb of the clause “She typically ___ them from sumac and cedar bark.”

steps.title: Apply the conjugation rule
steps.content: The main verb must be conjugated to match its subject. “Weaves” is the present tense form that agrees with the singular subject “She,” showing what she typically does. Non-conjugated forms like gerunds and infinitives cannot serve as the main verb. That matches choice C — C is correct.
